results.title: Credit card payment processor Zentoshin gets nod to begin bankruptcy proceedings
results.description: The company provided a service that paid sales proceeds to credit card merchants before they received payments from credit card companies.

results.title: Coca-Cola: Steady Growth Wins The Race (Rating Downgrade)
results.description: Coca-Cola is currently overvalued at ~25.8x 2026 EPS and yields only ~2.5%. Click here to see why KO stock is a Hold.

results.title: Eurobond repayment should be matched by support for MMDAs — Prof. Quartey
results.description: Economist Professor Peter Quartey has called on the government to complement its renewed commitment to external debt repayments with increased financial support for Metropolitan, Municipal and District Assemblies (MMDAs) and other public institutions, arguing that fiscal discipline should also be reflected in the timely release of domestic funds. Renault Master adds V2G support from September 2026
results.description: V2G capability in a commercial van shifts Master from a vehicle that consumes grid power to one that can also supply it The post Renault Master adds V2G support from September 2026 appeared first on Automotive World .

results.title: Wall Street, CEOs back Trump child savings plan
results.description: Some of America's biggest corporations and financial institutions lined up behind President Donald Trump's newly launched Trump Accounts programme, pledging financial support and describing it as an initiative that could broaden wealth creation for future generations.

results.title: Trump Ramps Up War on Regulations With 702 Cuts in Pipeline
results.description: The Trump administration is stepping up its efforts to cut red tape across the federal government, releasing a regulatory plan that would eliminate 702 existing administrative rules. The reductions published on Friday set a record for the number of deregulatory ...

results.title: Dalal Street Opens Mixed: Sensex Slips, Nifty Stays Above 24,430
results.description: Indian benchmark equity indices opened on a subdued note on Monday, mirroring mixed cues from global markets. The BSE Sensex slipped 4.53 points, or 0.01%, to 78,280.54 in early trade after opening at 78,461.16. The NSE Nifty 50, however, edged up 3.15 points, or 0.01%, to 24,433.50, after starting the session at 24,464.45, indicating a [...]
